name: codex-floating-companion
description: Connects Codex lifecycle events to the local Windows floating quota and activity companion.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose and repair the Windows companion connection.
interface.longDescription: Adds a focused status and repair workflow for the local Codex Floating Companion. Runtime events are installed safely as global hooks until plugin-local hook loading is reliable.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $companion-status to check the Codex Floating Companion connection.
